title: Comfort Pure Ultra Concentrated Fabric Conditioner 58 Washes, 870ml
features: Extra fragrance in-wash scent booster for clothes and fabrics
Fabric conditioner for an overall laundry fragrance
description: Product Description Comfort Pure Ultra Concentrated Fabric Conditioner brings the gentle softness and freshness your clothes need, ideal for families and individuals with sensitive skin . Specially formulated for softness, this ultra-concentrated conditioner provides 58 washes per 870ml bottle , making it both economical and eco-friendly, reducing the amount of plastic waste per use. Comfort Pure is hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested , ensuring a gentle touch for all skin types, including babies, and providing peace of mind for every wash. Infused with a mild fragrance, Comfort Pure keeps your clothes fresh while protecting delicate fabrics. The advanced formula helps reduce static cling, eases ironing, and prolongs the life of fabrics, ensuring your garments stay soft, smooth, and comforting. Ideal for all types of laundry loads, from daily clothing to bedding, Comfort Pure leaves a lasting gentle scent and a clean feel you can trust. Whether you’re washing baby clothes, linens, or everyday outfits, Comfort Pure Ultra Concentrated Fabric Conditioner provides superior fabric care, blending softness and lasting freshness. The convenient size and concentrated power make it a practical choice for busy households. Make every wash a comforting experience with Comfort Pure. Ingredients 15 - 30%: Cationic surfactants. <5%: Perfume, DMDM Hydantoin, Potassium Sorbate Directions Pour a 15 ml dose straight into your washing machine drawer alongside your regular liquid detergent, we recommend using alongside Persil Non Bio. Do not pour directly onto fabrics. Select your wash setting, then let your machine take care of the rest.
